name: should handle player_target_share_from_plays with a where clause
description: Test case for should handle player_target_share_from_plays with a where clause
expected_query: with "t3abfc4e176501ebf6fbf11063d97a561" as (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as trg_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."dwn" in (3) group by COALESCE(trg_pid) having SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= '15'), "t3a4db4122d63abd193bcca701c89977d" as (select "pg"."pid", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) as trg_share_from_plays from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."tm" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."dwn" in (3) group by "pg"."pid"), "t07820df87c6eb141299a209650a7d9b4" as (select "pg"."pid", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) as trg_share_from_plays from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."tm" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."qtr" in (1, 2) group by "pg"."pid") select "player"."pid", "t3abfc4e176501ebf6fbf11063d97a561"."trg_from_plays" AS "trg_from_plays_0", player.fname, player.lname, "t3a4db4122d63abd193bcca701c89977d"."trg_share_from_plays" AS "trg_share_from_plays_0", "t07820df87c6eb141299a209650a7d9b4"."trg_share_from_plays" AS "trg_share_from_plays_1", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "t3abfc4e176501ebf6fbf11063d97a561" on "t3abfc4e176501ebf6fbf11063d97a561"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t3a4db4122d63abd193bcca701c89977d" on "t3a4db4122d63abd193bcca701c89977d"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t07820df87c6eb141299a209650a7d9b4" on "t07820df87c6eb141299a209650a7d9b4"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by "t3abfc4e176501ebf6fbf11063d97a561"."trg_from_plays", player.fname, player.lname, "t3a4db4122d63abd193bcca701c89977d"."trg_share_from_plays", "t07820df87c6eb141299a209650a7d9b4"."trg_share_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 5 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
